Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction.

MINI MINUTES: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. No appearances. The court took the matter off calendar in light of no appearance by the moving party to provide a timely proof of service as requested in the tentative ruling. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
